name: Frieren Beyond Journey's End
description:
After centuries of wandering, the elven mage Frieren stumbles upon an ancient portal hidden within the ruins of a forgotten civilization. Drawn by its mysterious energy, she steps through—only to find herself in a world unlike any she has known. Here, magic is not studied but inherited, and those who attempt to defy this rule are cast away as heretics.

In this land shaped by celestial laws, Frieren meets a young scholar desperate to learn magic beyond their birthright. Intrigued, she takes them under her wing, setting off a chain of events that will challenge the very foundation of this world's existence. But as celestial beings begin to take notice, Frieren must decide whether to reshape this realm’s destiny or simply continue her journey as a silent observer of time.
creator: TheL0stS0ul
